what_it_does: Defines a right-facing chevron SVG icon using a single stroked path on a 24 by 24 viewBox.
observations: The icon uses no fill and strokes with currentColor.
Stroke width is 1.5 with rounded line caps and joins.
The path moves from left upper point to center right point to left lower point, forming a right chevron.
standouts: Color inherits from surrounding text or CSS through currentColor.
conventions: Uses standard SVG icon attributes for scalable UI glyphs.
Follows an outline icon convention with fill="none" and stroked geometry.
Uses rounded stroke cap and join settings.
Keeps the icon compact as a one-line SVG.
notes: A compact currentColor right-chevron outline icon for UI navigation or disclosure affordances.
purpose_vs_actual: The path and filename align: this file contains a right-facing chevron icon.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable right-chevron glyph that can inherit color from its UI context.
contribution: Provides a compact, themeable right-chevron navigation glyph with rounded stroke styling.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 SVG right-chevron icon made from a single rounded currentColor stroked path.
intention_for_embedding: This was for supplying a reusable right-facing chevron icon asset that adapts to surrounding UI color.
